title: Snap Map App (concept)
html: Stub. Concept-only project. First and only dated mention in 2019 07 22 run in morning ("start concept for snap map app"). Yahir age 17 logging a build idea inspired by Snapchat's Snap Map feature. No follow-up notes found; the idea died in the note. Significant only as the earliest documented build idea in the 2019 corpus, predating the Stanford via business pep-talk by two months.

related.label: Brotein App Store landing copy — 'gap between macro tracking and degen eating'
Run in morning — snap map app concept and pre-college todo
